blocks.text: Hovland in the hunt at golf's fifth major — monster weekend ahead
Hovland sits T13 at -3 after two rounds — NRK calls it a strong start. McNealy leads at -5 in a five-way tie. Two rounds left at Sawgrass, Norway's man is firmly in the picture.
🏎️ F1 Shanghai — Chinese GP weekend underway, Russell tops early 2026 standings with 25pts

blocks.label: ⚽ Premier League Saturday — Title Race On
items: Arsenal vs Everton — 18:30, leaders Arsenal 7pts clear at the top
Chelsea vs Newcastle — 18:30, Champions League places on the line
Man City vs West Ham — 21:00, City chasing Arsenal 7pts back
